_comment: Media-serving (object storage) config for web/storage.py — FLAT, 1-jump access (mirrors web/research_defaults.json + reel_jobs.RESEARCH_DEFAULTS). Tunable defaults are FALLBACKS applied only when the matching REEL_* env var is unset. Error copy is user-facing (surfaced in HTTP error bodies). Secrets/bucket creds stay in REEL_BUCKET_* env, never here.
